name: Visionaries: Small Solutions to Enormously Large Problems
original_name: Visionaries: Small Solutions to Enormously Large Problems
overview: An anthology series of seven documentary films written and directed by Tony Gailey and Julian Russell. Each piece examines the work of a living person who is a revolutionary thinker in their field. What the subjects have in common is a creative contribution to humanity that has the potential to elicit a paradigm shift—either by addressing global socioeconomic problems, or providing a radical scientific model to understanding a complex system.

trailers.title: Bill Mollison - In Grave Danger of Falling Food [3of5]
